zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Farway於大約1405年出生時，她的父親John Faraway42歲，母親Agnes de Longland36歲。她於1423年與Walter Stowell在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1423年享年19歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同聖 多馬 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Farway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Farway was born about 1405, her father, John Faraway, was 42 and her mother, Agnes de Longland, was 36. She married Walter Stowell in 1423, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1423, at the age of 19, and was buried in St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Walter Stowell en 1423, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1423, à l’âge de 19 ans, et a été enterrée à St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Farway(이)가 대략 1405년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Faraway(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Longland(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1423년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Walter Stowell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 19세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 컷헬스톤 스트 톰아스 프 캉르버이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Walter Stowell em 1423, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Farway родилась около 1405 г., её отцу по имени John Faraway было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Longland, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Stowell в 1423 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1423 г. в возрасте 19 лет и была похоронена в местности ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
